drop_reason: REJECTED upstream + 1-line user question + no behavioral signal. Verified upstream main HEAD of cmd/entire/cli/strategy/common.go: EnsureEntireGitignore requiredEntries still contains only [tmp/, settings.local.json, metadata/, logs/] — wingman.lock, wingman-state.json, wingman-payload.json, REVIEW.md were never merged. Instruction is the literal 1-line question 'wingman.lock and wingman-state.json should be added to gitignore?'. Trivial deliverable (4 string-literal additions to a hardcoded slice). install_config.json has _upgraded_from_legacy=true with empty FAIL_TO_PASS and empty PASS_TO_PASS, so test.sh falls back to overall pass rate of unrelated Go tests — zero behavioral signal for this specific change. No salvageable F2P path: the canonical patch is purely additive, has no companion test in the upstream repo (verified via session: 'No files found' for *_test.go files referencing EnsureEntireGitignore), and writing a synthetic F2P test would just regrep for the four hardcoded strings (R001 patch-overfit). Drop confirmed.
notes: Recommend removing harbor_tasks/cli-task-acdd84/ from active suite. No e2b template exists (per cli-task-acdd84.json status=skip, tb-cli-task-acdd84__513194fd missing), so no template cleanup needed.
